title: Prince Charming.
content:
This is Prince Charming,
        Whom often you meet,
    Riding or walking
        In Nursery Street.

    See the red feather
        He wears in his hat,
    Always you know he's
        Prince Charming by that.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Richard Hunter delivers a powerful performance in "Prince Charming."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
